TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: tqil qani ga giwal gluw na ngyaw uyi, mnanak na qsinux qa Taywan qani. Si say maha qsinux qa qaniq ququh qa tyaba nqu qsinux, uyuk hayi hi nya cpngan ngarux Taywan qani. tqli qani ga ngarux na Taywan san naha, ke Tayal sbalay ga Tqli san ta kmayal, blsuy san ta mlikuy, mzipu san yaya qa tqli hiya uyuk san uyuk tqli hiya. Ini knbisya ga wayal ktalan cinrapal na tqli qani, kintalan naha skura llyung Tasa kya yulaq na tqli qani, yunga nya laga uka cquliq ktayux tqli la. knahul lnhuyan klahang tqli qa cquliq na Taywan ro Amerika, htgan naha knahul pinnbaq naha yaw tqli wayal mpux cyugal kawas, saying seng kawas payat byaling pquyu naha wayal s'ungat tqli na Taywan la, payat byaling ga sinlwan naha pquyu maha wayal mrpyut qa tqli na Taywan la mah kmayal. Bnrwan qa galan cpung . 2004-07-26 (šł≠śĖá ‚Äé) ťõ≤ŤĪĻ
S.PHON: tqil qani …£a …£iwal …£luw na Ňčjaw uji, mnanak na qs~…ēinux qa tajwan qani. s~…ēi s~…ēaj mańßa qs~…ēinux qa qaniq ququńß qa tjaő≤a nqu qs~…ēinux, ujuk ńßaji ńßi nja ¶~ ®pŇčan Ňčarux tajwan qani. tqli qani …£a Ňčarux na tajwan s~…ēan nańßa, ke tajal s~…ēő≤alaj …£a tqli s~…ēan ta kmajal, ő≤ls~…ēuj s~…ēan ta mlikuj, mzipu s~…ēan jaja qa tqli ńßija ujuk s~…ēan ujuk tqli ńßija. ini knő≤is~…ēja …£a wajal ktalan ¶~ ®inrapal na tqli qani, kintalan nańßa s~…ēkura lljuŇč tas~…ēa kja julaq na tqli qani, juŇča nja la…£a uka ¶~ ®quliq ktajux tqli la. knańßul lnńßujan klańßaŇč tqli qa ¶~ ®quliq na tajwan ro amerika, ńßt…£an nańßa knańßul pinnő≤aq nańßa jaw tqli wajal mpux ¶~ ®ju…£al kawas~…ē, s~…ēajiŇč s~…ēeŇč kawas~…ē pajat ő≤jaliŇč pquju nańßa wajal s~…ē ĒuŇčat tqli na tajwan la, pajat ő≤jaliŇč …£a s~…ēinlwan nańßa pquju mańßa wajal mrpjut qa tqli na tajwan la mańß kmajal. ő≤nrwan qa …£alan ¶~ ®puŇč . ****-**-** (** *) **
S.FORM: tqil qani ga giwal gluw na ngyaw uyi, mnanak na qsinux qa Taywan qani. Si say maha qsinux qa qaniq ququh qa tyaba nqu qsinux, uyuk hayi hi nya cpngan ngarux Taywan qani. tqli qani ga ngarux na Taywan san naha, ke Tayal sbalay ga Tqli san ta kmayal, blsuy san ta mlikuy, mzipu san yaya qa tqli hiya uyuk san uyuk tqli hiya. Ini knbisya ga wayal ktalan cinrapal na tqli qani, kintalan naha skura llyung Tasa kya yulaq na tqli qani, yunga nya laga uka cquliq ktayux tqli la. knahul lnhuyan klahang tqli qa cquliq na Taywan ro Amerika, htgan naha knahul pinnbaq naha yaw tqli wayal mpux cyugal kawas, saying seng kawas payat byaling pquyu naha wayal s'ungat tqli na Taywan la, payat byaling ga sinlwan naha pquyu maha wayal mrpyut qa tqli na Taywan la mah kmayal. Bnrwan qa galan cpung . 2004-07-26 (šł≠śĖá ‚Äé) ťõ≤ŤĪĻ
S.PHON: tqil qani …£a …£iwal …£luw na Ňčjaw uji, mnanak na qs~…ēinux qa tajwan qani. s~…ēi s~…ēaj mańßa qs~…ēinux qa qaniq ququńß qa tjaő≤a nqu qs~…ēinux, ujuk ńßaji ńßi nja ¶~ ®pŇčan Ňčarux tajwan qani. tqli qani …£a Ňčarux na tajwan s~…ēan nańßa, ke tajal s~…ēő≤alaj …£a tqli s~…ēan ta kmajal, ő≤ls~…ēuj s~…ēan ta mlikuj, mzipu s~…ēan jaja qa tqli ńßija ujuk s~…ēan ujuk tqli ńßija. ini knő≤is~…ēja …£a wajal ktalan ¶~ ®inrapal na tqli qani, kintalan nańßa s~…ēkura lljuŇč tas~…ēa kja julaq na tqli qani, juŇča nja la…£a uka ¶~ ®quliq ktajux tqli la. knańßul lnńßujan klańßaŇč tqli qa ¶~ ®quliq na tajwan ro amerika, ńßt…£an nańßa knańßul pinnő≤aq nańßa jaw tqli wajal mpux ¶~ ®ju…£al kawas~…ē, s~…ēajiŇč s~…ēeŇč kawas~…ē pajat ő≤jaliŇč pquju nańßa wajal s~…ē ĒuŇčat tqli na tajwan la, pajat ő≤jaliŇč …£a s~…ēinlwan nańßa pquju mańßa wajal mrpjut qa tqli na tajwan la mańß kmajal. ő≤nrwan qa …£alan ¶~ ®puŇč . ****-**-** (** *) **
